top_signals.title: Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
top_signals.summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
